## Wiring type

The Wiring is a record where each key is an EmpathyX event, and the value is a dictionary of wires.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type Wiring = {
    [Event in XEvent]: Dictionary<WireForEvent<Event>>;
};
```
<b>References:</b> [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md)<!-- -->, [WireForEvent](./x-components.wireforevent.md)
